description: Heatmap chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'x', 'y', and 'value' columns.

showValues.description: Show numeric values inside each cell.

cellGap.description: Gap between heatmap cells in pixels.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string.
